name: Breakfast Chicken Casserole
servings: serves 8 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 25 minutes
method: Spread the butter evenly over the inside surface of the Dutch oven.
Beat the eggs in a bowl. Add the milk, Italian herbs, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Make a layer of bread in the Dutch oven. Cover it with the shredded chicken.
Cover the Dutch oven and cook for 20–25 minutes.
Add the cheese, cover again, and cook for 10–15 minutes more until the eggs are well cooked.
